data.title: Load/update GDScript from disk on load if cache mode is CACHE_MODE_IGNORE
Vulkan: GPU validation errors

Improve `linuxbsd` headless building, cleanup build scripts
Implement Vector4, Vector4i, Projection built-in types.

Rework content scale to provide more options, add integer scaling

Add a note to classes without any documentation
Add methods and signal in GridMap for multithreading

Add RelaxedFlag, the relaxed counterpart of SafeFlag
Use bc7e texture compression for faster and more efficient texels.
move_and_slide() changes x and z trajectory when climbing slopes that count as floors
Defer `tab_changed` signal when removing children from `TabContainer` nodes
